mnemonics: JButton is a 'PUSH' for action: Program User-triggered Swift Happenings
keyPoints: JButton is a component that a user clicks to trigger a specific action.
An ActionListener is used to handle the button click event and define the action to be performed.
Buttons can be customized with text, icons, mnemonics (keyboard shortcuts), and tooltips.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to attach an ActionListener to the button, resulting in a click that does nothing.
Not using SwingUtilities.invokeLater() to ensure the GUI is created on the Event Dispatch Thread (EDT), which can lead to thread-safety issues.
